subject: [PATCH v2 10/14] fuse: add io-uring buffer rings

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary:
Reviewer questioned the significance of U16_MAX in the code, explaining it as a limitation due to the buf_id field being a u16 in struct fuse_uring_ent_in_out

reviewer noted that the if check can be skipped because queue->bufring should be NULL when use_bufring is false
reviews.raw_body:
Yes, this is because in the uapi, struct fuse_uring_ent_in_out's
buf_id field is set to a uint16_t.

---

I will drop this if check in the next version.

Thank you for taking the time to review this series.

Thanks,
Joanne

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch adds support for io-uring buffer rings to the fuse file system. It introduces a new field in the fuse_uring_ent_in_out structure, buf_id, which is an unsigned short (u16) and has a maximum value of U16_MAX. This allows for up to 2^16 buffers to be used with the io-uring interface.
